int.label: Main Frame Origin same as Ad
Main Frame Origin differs from Ad
Main Frame Origin same as Ad Creative
Main Frame Origin differs from Ad Creative
Ad Creative Origin Unknown and Ad Not Throttled
Ad Creative Origin Unknown and Ad Throttled
Ad Creative Origin Same as Main Frame and Ad Not Throttled
Ad Creative Origin Differs from Main Frame and Ad Not Throttled

enum.name: HeavyAdStatus2
enum.int: The ad exceeded the network threshold for the Heavy Ad Intervention.
The ad exceeded the total CPU usage threshold for the Heavy Ad Intervention.
The ad exceeded the peak CPU usage threshold for the Heavy Ad Intervention.

enum.name: InternalErrorLoadEvent
enum.summary: Internal Errors in the page_load_metrics system

int.label: Invalid timing IPC sent from renderer (deprecated)
IPC received while not tracking a relevant committed load
IPC received from a frame we navigated away from
IPC received from a bad URL scheme
No IPCs received for this navigation
Page end reported before navigation start
Multiple aborted provisional loads at navigation start
User input received while not tracking a relevant committed load (deprecated)
No commit or failed provisional load received
No page load end time recorded
Subframe navigation start before main frame navigation start
IPC received from subframe while not tracking a committed load
PageLoadFeatures received from browser process while not tracking a relevant committed load
Image is loaded from memory cache
Image is preloaded after receiving a 103 (Early Hints) response
Image is loaded from memory and preloaded after receiving a 103 (Early Hints) response

enum.name: LcppPredictResult
enum.int: Prediction failed. No learned locator hit the actual LCP.
Prediction failed. LCP is predicted but the actual LCP is unrecorded one.
Prediction failed. LCP is predicted but the actual LCP is one with the same locator.
Prediction failed. LCP is predicted but the actual LCP is one with another leaned locator.

enum.name: MhtmlLoadResult
enum.int: Failed to load archive because the file was empty
Failed to load archive because the url wasn't http(s), file, or content
Failed to load archive because it was not valid MHTML
Failed to load archive because it had no main resource

enum.name: PageLoadTimingStatus
enum.summary: Status of PageLoadTimings received from the render process

int.label: Script load longer than parse duration
Script execution longer than parse duration
Script load from doc.write longer than total script load
Script execution from doc.write longer than total script execution
Invalid order - response start / parse start
Invalid order - parse start / parse stop
Invalid order - parse stop / dom content loaded
Invalid order - dom content loaded / load
Invalid order - parse start / first layout
Invalid order - first layout / first paint
Invalid order - first paint / first text paint
Invalid order - first paint / first image paint
Invalid order - first paint / first contentful paint
Invalid order - first paint / first meaningful paint
Invalid order - first meaningful paint / interactive
First input delay without first input timestamp
First input timestamp without first input delay
Longest input delay without longest input timestamp
Longest input timestamp without longest input delay
Longest input timestamp earlier than first input timestamp
Longest input delay less than first input delay
Invalid order - parse start / activation start
Invalid order - activation start / first paint
Independent Visit; the page is opened from UI or in new tab, and not followed by any link navigation. (obsolete)
Origin Visit; the page is opened from UI or in new tab, and followed by a link navigation. (obsolete)
PassingVisit; the page is visited and followed by link navigations.
TerminalVisit; the page is visited by a link navigation, but not followed by any link navigation.
HistoryVisit; the page is visited by a history navigation.
Independent Link Visit; the page is opened in a new tab, and not followed by any link navigation.
Independent UI Visit; the page is opened from UI, and not followed by any link navigation.
Origin Link Visit; the page is opened in a new tab, and followed by a link navigation.
Origin UI Visit; the page is opened from UI, and followed by a link navigation.
Allow by explicit cookie content setting (e.g. Enterprise Policy: CookiesAllowedForUrls, UserBypass)
Allow by global 3p cookie setting setting (e.g. Enterprise Policy: BlockThirdPartyCookies, UX, Default allow)
Allow by 3PCD metadata grants content settings (Global Allowlist)
Allow by top-level Storage access API
